<!-- Thanks for contributing! A few things that make reviews faster: -->

## What

<!-- One or two sentences describing what this PR does. If it's a bug fix, link the issue. -->

## Why

<!-- Brief motivation — what triggered this change. Skip for obvious refactors. -->

## Testing

<!-- What you did to verify this works. At minimum for code changes: -->

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:coverage` still reports 100% across statements / branches / functions / lines
- [ ] `npm run build` produces a clean `dist/` with source maps and type declarations

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything tricky, edge cases you considered, or things you specifically want feedback on. -->
